name: Ray Eberle
abstract: Raymond Eberle (January 19, 1919 – August 25, 1979) was a vocalist during the Big Band Era, making his name with the Glenn Miller Orchestra. His elder brother, Bob Eberly, sang with the Jimmy Dorsey Orchestra.

about_quotes.speaker: Charlie Barnet
about_quotes.evidence: The only high spot is a jam session sequence featuring Art Tatum piano, Charlie Barnet, alto sax, Ziggy Elman, trumpet, Tommy Dorsey, trombone, Jimmy Dorsey, clarinet, Ray Bauduc, drums, plus bass and guitar

about_quotes.speaker: Arthur "Monk" Hazel
about_quotes.evidence: that's a Jimmy Dorsey's band... let's see Ray Eberle or somebody? no Bob Eberle... I played the cornet then... in that band
